description: The Crazy Dragons are a street gang active in the Prairie provinces of Canada, founded in Edmonton, Alberta as a successor to the Vietnamese Trang gang. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, gunrunning, and violent crimes. It has expanded from Alberta into Saskatchewan and has become more ethnically diverse over time.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Crazy Dragons primarily sell cocaine imported from Los Angeles via Vancouver into communities in the Prairie provinces...
country_links.context: The Crazy Dragons import cocaine from Los Angeles.
